text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest—a festival held to celebrate the
fans who regularly support our racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The athletic competitions are the highlight of the
Spring Fan Fest...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This is so exciting! The 2,000-meter dirt
race is next!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...In other words, it's your turn to compete! Get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! No way! I'm in the middle of a date with my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Not you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... You're such a meanie. Ruining my date
like that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Seriously? We might be at a festival today, but
aren't you gettin' a bit too carried away?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Have you already forgotten? Look around.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And take note.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Of what?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. I'll show you what I've got.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Heh... Don't get too cocky.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, everyone's looking at me! ☆ Oooh, guess
I'm stealing all the attention! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Well?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...I've never raced against most of these racers
before.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Exactly. This is quite a rare lineup.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's true that this race is just for fun, but that's
exactly why...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You can face off against opponents you normally
wouldn't.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This race is your one and only chance to take on
this lineup.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So just this once... go out there and have as much
fun as possible.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...As much fun as possible?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Precisely. This race will also help you grow! So—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Grow?! Into an adult?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Copy that! ☆ Today, I'll soar right past even you,
Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Don't get too carried away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon after, the 2,000-meter dirt race begins...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Argh... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Mayano! Looks like ya had a crash
landing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Still, this is a good opportunity for you. Sear the
faces of the winners into your mind and use the
frustration you feel as a springboard.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's how I got to where I am. Heh.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mmph... I have to get better... I have to grow!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Falco!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urgh! No, no, no! I hate this!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna hear Trainer praise me like that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You really are obsessed with your trainer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... I wanted to show Trainer that I've grown
up.
choice_data_list: I can already feel that you have.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I'm gonna go run in another race! And I'm
totally gonna win this time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I already told ya that you can only run once!
Unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and I run off to stop the manic
Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Traaaainer! I got first! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Keep the praise coming! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...What a fearsome sight. To think you would beat
not just me but everyone in that race...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! Thanks for encouraging me to race,
Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It was super fun! And so... exciting too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I thought about all the things I could only do in
that race, and a bunch of strategies popped into
my head!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I tried all the most exciting running styles I could
think of.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You came up with all that on the fly?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You really are gonna be a thorn in my side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I really felt like I could see Mayano Top
Gun's growth with my own two eyes.
